summary: Iteration 19 Testing COMPLETED: Ebank, QR Generation, Sponsor Registration, and New Fields. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified - Admin Members form has 4 tabs (Personal, Membership, Ebank, Business Card), My Ebank page works with Activities tab, Passport ID# field in Membership Profile, sponsor-based registration skips invite code.
passed_tests: Backend: Admin login with admin@consultant.com / Admin123!
Backend: Wrong password correctly rejected with 401
Backend: GET /api/member/ebank returns ebank data
Backend: PUT /api/member/ebank saves data correctly
Backend: GET /api/member/ebank/activities returns activity log sorted most recent first
Backend: POST /api/admin/members/:id/generate-qr creates QR code with correct URL format
Backend: QR URL format is {base_url}/my-account/register?sponsor={membership_number}
Backend: GET /api/member/validate-sponsor/:num validates valid sponsor
Backend: GET /api/member/validate-sponsor/:num returns 404 for invalid sponsor
Backend: Registration via sponsor captures http_access domain
Backend: GET /api/admin/members/:id/ebank returns ebank data for admin
Backend: Create member with passport_id and zelle fields
Backend: Update member passport_id and zelle fields
Backend: GET /api/admin/member-types returns types
Frontend: Admin Members Manager loads with 4 tabs (Personal, Membership, Ebank, Business Card)
Frontend: Personal tab shows HTTP Access (read-only), Passport ID#, Zelle # fields
Frontend: Ebank tab shows read-only financial fields
Frontend: Business Card tab shows 'Click Here' to generate QR
Frontend: My Ebank page loads with My Finances and Activities tabs
Frontend: My Ebank Activities tab shows logged field changes
Frontend: Membership Profile shows Passport ID# field in edit and view mode
Frontend: My Ebank link visible in sidebar below My Sponsor
Frontend: Sponsor-based registration (/my-account/register?sponsor=1) shows sponsor info and skips invite code

bug_fixed.description: Fixed sponsor-based registration failing when sponsor_membership_number is 0
bug_fixed.fix: Changed 'elif sponsor_number:' to 'elif sponsor_number is not None:' to handle membership_number 0 (admin)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 verified: (1) Admin Members form has 4 tabs: Personal (HTTP Access read-only, Passport ID#, Zelle #), Membership, Ebank (read-only 16 fields), Business Card (QR generation). (2) POST /api/admin/members/:id/generate-qr creates QR with URL format {base_url}/my-account/register?sponsor={membership_number}. (3) GET /api/member/validate-sponsor/:num validates sponsor for QR-based registration. (4) Registration via sponsor (?sponsor=X) skips invite code, captures http_access domain. (5) My Ebank page at /my-account/ebank has editable financial fields and Activities tab logging each field change. (6) Membership Profile shows Passport ID# field. (7) Fixed bug: sponsor_membership_number=0 was failing due to falsy check.
